drill: DEPLOY-1.7a — clean-VPS pilot smoke + off-box backup §2-invariant verification (D-067)

metadata.environment: real VPS — Debian/Ubuntu LTS, public DNS + HTTPS contour up via Caddy + ACME
metadata.notes: Live pilot-smoke evidence and off-box §2-invariant verification. Per the DEPLOY-1.7a redaction rule (RUNBOOK §"Clean-VPS pilot smoke (DEPLOY-1.7a / D-067)"), credential-bearing values (PUBLIC_HOSTNAME, BACKUP_S3_BUCKET, BACKUP_S3_ENDPOINT, BACKUP_S3_PATH_PREFIX, BACKUP_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID, BACKUP_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, webhook URL token) are replaced by <REDACTED> placeholders or a _redacted: true flag; structural outcomes (status strings, log-line shapes, status transitions, additivity-smoke booleans) are preserved verbatim. Operator action required: replace the <verbatim from VPS> placeholders below with the actual captured observations from the live smoke run before committing.

telegram_round_trip.observed_log_line_shape: telegram.webhook update_id=<id> route=start route_source=command confidence=n/a edit_seq=0 lifecycle=other effective_path=n/a
telegram_round_trip.getupdates_409_note: Polling getUpdates against the bot token returns HTTP 409 while the webhook is registered. Expected with webhook active; not a defect.

offbox_backup_verification.preconditions: BACKUP_S3_BUCKET, BACKUP_S3_ENDPOINT, BACKUP_S3_PATH_PREFIX, BACKUP_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID, BACKUP_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY filled against a reachable S3-compatible bucket the operator owns. Credential values and endpoint / bucket / prefix strings not captured in this artifact.

additivity_smoke.procedure: Per RUNBOOK §"Off-box backup sink (DEPLOY-1.6 / D-065)" — force an upload failure (stop endpoint / revoke credentials / break network) and trigger another cycle. The mechanism is operator's choice; the captured outcome is what matters.

last_offbox_json_after_forced_failure.error: <verbatim categorized reason class: temporary | fatal | auth_failed | network | remote_error>

out_of_scope_for_this_packet: v2 → v3 cross-version upgrade drill on a real previously-installed v2 VPS — DEPLOY-1.7b.

Phase-4 UX polish surfaced during smoke (/note first-line ISO-date strictness; /ask user-facing wording leaking chunk UUID + the phrase 'dense+sparse RRF'; no-memories-matched UX). Flagged in D-067 as observations; deferred to a post-DEPLOY-1 packet.
